 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1869, PR1050558-1925 Remove required from Type field on the omniscript/screen
Use messaging (formula validation) to check if more than one “Additional Bonus” is added and Display Validation message , and prevent the user from adding more than one additional bonus.
0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project _Story focus on systematically enforcing that the user can only add the additional bonus (types) to one facility/HPF. Split from story_ [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-194|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-194|smart-link]

Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* record
And completed the *Contract Request* [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link]
And I am on *Clinician Contract’s Summary tab*
Then the system shall only allow Additional Bonuses (types) to be added to *One* Facility/HPF.

* The “Type” field that holds the Additional Bonuses values should be optional
** ONCE a Type (Additional Bonuses) is selected, then Rate and Unit of Measure are Required.
* Once the user has added Additional Bonuses to one Facility, then they are NOT allowed to add to another facility.
* If the user deletes all the Additional Bonuses from a Facility, then they can add Additional Bonuses to a new facility.
* Help Text: Enter the bonus to the facility at which they are primarily working.
* -Error message if the user tries to add additional bonuses to more than one HPF/Facility: Additional bonuses can only be added to one facility.- NOT NEEDED, solution will be to hide Help Text, Type, Rate, Unit of Measure. 		26/Aug/25 12:38 PM   3 14/Aug/25 8:24 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 14/Aug/25 8:34 PM 1|i0dc6f: 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM As a Recruiter, I need to request approval for clinician compensation, so that I can offer appropriate pay and incentives for clinicians to join SCP 18/Aug/25

Clinician Contract Request: Bonus - Enforce additional bonus on 1 Facility/HPF

None

1|i0cyd7: 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM Steps:
1-Login as Recruiter and navigate to the Corp HC org.
2-Create a Clinician Account record and make sure to create HPF as well.
3-Now make sure to create Client Contract with the same Account which is a lookup on HPF Record.
4-Now run the Specify Rates flow on the Client Contract record and complete it.
5-Navigate back to the Clinician Account which we created previously and start and complete the Contract Request flow.
6-Upon completion the Clinician Contract record gets created.
7-Navigate to the Related tab of the Clinician Contract record and verify CPA Records are not created and on PNC the Facility Title field is coming blank.
8-Navigate to the Summary tab and even if the HPF Record is present - A note is being displayed.
9-Click on the Configure Rate button and select Type of Rate similar to the step 3 Type of Rate.
10-Click next and on Rate selection screen the table is not being displayed.
11- Submit the flow and upon submission the flow got stuck.

Issue 1 - On Client Contract record - under the summary tab - Facility Title is not showing up.
Similarly under the PCA Records the Facility Title is not coming as a Recuiter.

Issue 2-After completion of Contract Req flow, the Clinician Contract record got created but CPA Records are not displayed.
Also on PNC Facility Title field is coming blank.

Issue 3-If the user navigated to the Summary tab, over there - User is able to see a note stating that - 'No rates are currently available'.

Issue 4-If user clicks on Configure Rates button then for all the Types of Rate on the Rate Selection screen the table is not displayed.

Issue 5-Even if table is not displayed user clicks on next button and the flow was blocked.

Issue 6 - The button name should be Finish, as of now it is Next.

Issue 7:Navigate to [*Contract*|https://corehc--qa.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Contract/800gP000003qfVEQAY/view] *>* Click on Configure rate > select stipend > User is able to see the existing Rate, select click on Next . Flow does not getting closed and *records are getting created* 		08/Aug/25

Not able to Configure Rate for Clinician Contracts

None

*Steps to Reproduce:*

# Open clinician record & associate HPF of Employment Type = Indpendent contracter.
# Run Contract request flow & Select Employment type = Employee & Click on Next button.
## Error is displayed. Clinician does not have …HPF.
# Click on Next/Finish button.
## *Expected Result:* No Contract should be created.
## *Actual result:* Contract is being created.



# -Open Contract record, update status to Executed & Run the Contract request flow again. with Type = Employee.-
# -Click on “Start From Previous Active Contract” button.-
## *-Expected result:-* -Contract should be cloned from Existing Executed contract and New Contract name should be updated to “Clinician name + Todays date.-
## -Parent Contract (lookup) = Executed contract id (from where it cloned from).-
## *-Actual Result :-* -Name & Parent contract field is not present.-
# -Click on Related tab.-
## *-Expected result.-*-: CPA & PCN record should be created.-
## *-Actual result:-* -CPA record is not being created.-

1|i0cokj: 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM *Steps to Reproduce:*
1. Login to Core HC org as Recruiter.
2. Navigates to the Accounts tab > Click on Create Clinician record
3. Click on Create HPF button on top right corner.
4. Fill the madatory field and click on Next button on the Update NPI page.
5. Click on Finish button on Update NPI page > and Check Primary Specialty & Practicing Specialty fields on the Clinician Information page.
6. Fill the Primary Specialty & Practicing Specialty fields on the Clinician Information page > and click on Next button.
7. Search for Service account able to add the service account.
8. Fill the mandatory fields Facility Association page > Click on Save and Refresh After Save button.
9. Click on Next button on the Facility Association page.
10. Click on Qualifications tab.
11. Verify that Healthcare Provider Specialty record.

*Expected Result:* Should show Healthcare Provider Specialty record.

*Actual Result:* Record shouldn't be created.
Please find the evidence.

[^Screenshare_326- 2025-07-30 5_24_11 PM.mp4]

Healthcare Provider Specialty record not getting creatd when creating HPF

# HealthCare PayerNetwork
# HealthCare Provider 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps

When I navigate to a Clinician *Contract* record
And I am on the Summary tab
And Contract status = *Draft*
Then I have the to click on *Add HPF* button
And the HPF Selection screen is displayed (built in story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893|smart-link] +& additional filter/validation called out in+ [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link])
And the clinician’s existing Healthcare Practitioner Facility records should be filtered based on the contract’s Employment Type.

And available Navigation buttons are:

* Cancel
** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated
* Finish
** If I select an Healthcare Practitioner Facility(s), that:
*** HAS already been added from the active contract (user selected “Start From Previous Active Contract” - facility and rates were cloned)
**** Then the system shall add Healthcare Practitioner Facility to the Clinician’s Contract in *Green* (note: no rates are added at this point. User must configure rates)
**** And previous Healthcare Practitioner Facility w/cloned rates has been *grey/inactive/removed*.
***** If the Healthcare Practitioner Facility (cloned ID is populated) been *grey/inactive/removed*, then on the “Configure Rates” button shall be hidden.
*** HAS NOT been added from an active contract
**** Then the system shall add Healthcare Practitioner Facility to the Clinician’s Contract (note: no rates are added at this point. User must configure rates)
** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab

Note: Configure Rates button are part of stories:

* Bonus [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-194|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-194|smart-link]
* Target [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1103|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1103|smart-link]
* Variable [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1108|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1108|smart-link]
* Stipend [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1108|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1108|smart-link]
* Leadership Incentives [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1110|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1110|smart-link]
* Shift [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-210|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-210|smart-link] (starting from the “Rate Selection” screen) 		12/Aug/25 10:35 PM   3 image-20250728-140903.png 29/Jul/25 11:18 AM SCP Sprint 6 29/Jul/25 11:18 AM 1|i0cif7: 12/Mar/26 1:50 PM As a Recruiter, I need the ability to add additional Healthcare Practitioner Facility records to a Clinician Contract in Draft Status, so that I can appropriately offer appropriate pay and incentives for clinicians to join SCP 05/Aug/25

And clicked the *Specify Rates* button (part of [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-703|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-703|smart-link] )
And I am presented with a Rate Type screen to capture:

* Type of Rate (Contract Payment Agreement, field = Type)
** Required to select one from the following list of values to proceed to the next screen:
*** Stipend
*** *Shift*
*** Variable
*** Target
*** Leadership Incentives
*** Bonus
* Facility Selection
** Select one option between (required):
*** Employed NP/PA
*** Other Facility Titles

And when I select *Shift*
*Then I am present with the following error message and I am unable to proceed: Please add Shift record(s) to proceed. To add a Shift, go to the Related tab and click “New” in the Shift related list.* 		08/Aug/25 2:22 PM   4 image-20250731-130604.png 28/Jul/25 12:26 PM SCP Sprint 6 31/Jul/25 9:06 AM 1|i0chbg:i 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a SFO (Staffing Fulfillment Optimization) user, I want the system to display an error message if I have not added new Shifts for this Contract and I try to Specify Rates, so that I am reminded to add Shifts first. 30/Jul/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1426, PR1050558-1427, PR1050558-1593 * CET: Clinician Experience Team, supports Clinician once contract is complete.
* _clinician onboarding sheet_ - [https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1YC9vi1-hRUZfYPY3doZwSIxczV2HtMeLl6jcUrI-qKY/edit?usp=sharing|https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1YC9vi1-hRUZfYPY3doZwSIxczV2HtMeLl6jcUrI-qKY/edit?usp=sharing|smart-link]
** If the sheet references “Account Team” for Case Owner, then set the case owner to the initiating user (user who initiated the New Clinician Onboarding). Account Team Role (614) story is in next sprint and will include updating the case owner to a specific Account Team Role user.
* Please ensure that the solution is reusable, in a future story upon the Contract being Executed, we will need to automatically trigger the creation of the SCP Onboarding parent case and child cases. Future Story: [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-620|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-620|smart-link]



Notes:

In order to set Case.Owner field following needs to be done:

# Get Service Account from the HPF for that Clinician (PractitionerId) Sort by Created DEC and pick the latest crated
# Query ALL Account Team Member with role 'Clinician Experience Specialist' belonging which Account is one of the Service Account in 1 and ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC
# Select the first one from 2.

In ClinicianCreateManualOnboardingIP we already have the selected HPF’s

!Captura de pantalla 2025-07-30 a la(s) 8.38.12 p.m..png|width=637,height=651,alt="Captura de pantalla 2025-07-30 a la(s) 8.38.12 p.m..png"!



Modify IP called DE_LoadAccountTeamMembers to retrieve the correct AccountTeamMember. The problem now is that we are using the Clinician accountId and not the service account. As we can ssee in following image AccountTeamMember is only related with Service Accounts. We need to retrieve ALL the service accounts for the given contract via the PNC.

* For *Case Owner* - Confirmed if we do NOT have any Account Team member = *Clinician Experience Specialist*, then leave case owner as the initiating user (user who initiated the early onboarding). 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a MSL in the Corporate Support apps
When an early onboarding was initiated via the guided “Initiate Early Onboarding” experience. (Related Story: [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-145|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-145|smart-link] )
And the user selects "SCP", or "Both" for question “What onboarding type needs to start early?”
_additional criteria for creating cases are captured in the clinician onboarding sheet_
Then I need the following +parent case+ to be created with *clinician onboarding* case record type (update to related story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-562|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-562|smart-link] )

* One Case for Clinician being onboarding: Record Type = Clinician Onboarding, Type = SCP

Then the following information is populated:

* Status = Not Started
* Contact Name = clinician
* Type = SCP for clinician onboarding
* Case Origin = Manual
* Priority = Medium (unless specified in early onboarding flow)
* *Case Owner = Account Team’s Clinician Experience Specialist*
** *Use the most recently added Clinician Experience Specialist that was added in HPF*

AND the following related SCP Child case shall be created (updates to related story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-622|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-622|smart-link] )

* Training & SCP University
* HR Setup

Then the following information is populated:

* Status = Not Started
* Contact Name = clinician
* Type = SCP
* Case Origin = Manual
* Priority = Medium (unless specified in early onboarding flow)
* *Case Owner = Account Team’s Clinician Experience Specialist*
** *Use the most recently added Clinician Experience Specialist that was added in HPF* 		08/Aug/25 12:17 PM   5 Captura de pantalla 2025-07-30 a la(s) 8.38.12 p.m..png 28/Jul/25 10:53 AM SCP Sprint 6 30/Jul/25 2:52 AM 1|i099yr:zx 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Medical Staff Liaison, I need a parent onboarding case to always be created during the onboarding process, so that I can easily view all child cases under a single umbrella case 01/Aug/25

* Independent Contractor

* Partner

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1455, PR1050558-1456, PR1050558-1441, PR1050558-1442, PR1050558-1641 Use Employment_Type to know if Contract will be IC or EE.

Query ALL the active Contracts for the given Clinician. Per following Diagram we Query using the Person Account Id in Contract object.

!Captura de pantalla 2025-07-30 a la(s) 9.20.17 p.m..png|width=392,height=222,alt="Captura de pantalla 2025-07-30 a la(s) 9.20.17 p.m..png"!



DON’T USE Clinician__c for this.

Check if Employment Type are different and one is EE and the other IC.

IF previous condition is true, set the Start Date from new Contract using End Date of Active Contract.



Create a flow on the Contract Request that runs when the Contract.Status = 'Executed' that updates all Provider Network Contract and Contract Payment Agreements where the Contract is the previous one and set the ContractId to the new ContractId. In order to get the old Contract we query using clinicianId, employment type and the end date should be the start date of the new one.

In order to CLONE facilities

# query for all HPF for active Contract. Do this query using PNC.
# Remove the HPF Id and, and save.
# Create PNC records, for all the HPF’s from 2. and for the new Contract. 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project {color:#403294}*I Cannot Have EE and IC Contracts Active at Same Time*{color}

Then I am able to select facilities as built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893|smart-link]

When I request a contract for EE when an IC contract is active (and vice versa), then the End Date on the Active IC contract is populated with the Start Date of the EE contract

_Note (built in_ [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1389|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1389|smart-link] and [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link] _): When a Clinician Contract is created and they already have an active contract, clone all facility associations and their rates for the recruiter to manually adjust as needed_

* -Replace- *-Preventive Care Agreement-*-,Target Plan Rate with Rate field where ever its referred. Check Omni Script.-



DEPLOYMENT COMMENT: As there is an issue with Permissions Se (looks like previous Permissions Set bring incorrect changes) we need to do the commit using Full operation instead of Add. We do the commit and edit manually the Permissions Sets. As there are many changes missing in the Permission Set the delta changes in Add operation are not fixing the PS in QA. This is something we need to avoid at ALL cost. If i normally see a Full PS I will reject it. Here looks like the fastest way to fix the missing things in QA and git. This way we should be able to use only DELTA commits in PS in future. 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a System Administrator

* Person Account (Clinician)
** add the following fields: Other Address, Maiden/Previous/Former Name
** update picklist values on the following field: Gender
** update Field Name for the following field: SCP Email (change to SCP_Email__c)
** rename Other Address to Payroll Address
* Pro Forma Model AND Pro Forma Facility Detail
** add the following fields: Physician Comp (Above Below State Avg)
** change field type from text to picklist: Financial Contract Type
** change field type from checkbox to percent: Compensation Buffer
* Pro Forma Model
** add the following fields: Comments
* Pro Forma Facility Detail
** change field type from text to lookup: Service Line
* Healthcare Practitioner Facility
** add the following fields: Hospital Application Sent On
** add Help Text to the following fields: Hospital Application Sent On, Hospital Application Received Date, Hospital Application Sent Date
** Delete Current_Facility_Title__c in Dev and QA (also in branch)
** Delete Future_Facility_Title__c in Dev and QA (also in branch)
* -Preventive Care Agreement-
** -delete Target_Plan_Rate_--_c and *replace this field with Rate_--_c field if its referred in any places like OmniScript*-

Then I can see that the fields and page layouts match what is specified in the data dictionary 		12/Aug/25 4:29 PM   5 image-20250807-204220.png 24/Jul/25 12:17 PM SCP Sprint 6 31/Jul/25 6:14 PM 1|i0chba: 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a System Administrator, I need necessary fields to be created, so that integrations and functional processes can run smoothly with necessary information 01/Aug/25

!Captura de pantalla 2025-07-29 a la(s) 7.53.26 p.m..png|width=50%,alt="Captura de pantalla 2025-07-29 a la(s) 7.53.26 p.m..png"!

Filter HPF based on: PNC record → Contract status = (*_New, Draft, Submitted, or Approved_*) 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Medical Staff Liaison, Enrollment Specialist, Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support App
When I navigate to a *clinician* person account record
Then I can click on the *Initiate Early Onboarding* button
Then I am presented with the following:

* +Check if a Contract has been requested+: if this clinician does not have a Contract record where Status = New, Draft, Submitted, or Approved, then I am presented with the following message: “This clinician does not have a requested contract. We cannot initiate early onboarding. Please discuss with the recruiter for this clinician’s facility.”

_And I am able to populate the following:_

* _What onboarding type needs to start early?_
** _Facility specific, SCP, or both_
* +_If facility specific or both_+_: select from a list of Healthcare Practitioner Facility records (display Status field) without existing onboarding cases_ *_(filter HPF based on Contract Status = New, Draft, Submitted, or Approved)_*
** If no Healthcare Practitioner Facility record meet the criteria then display the following message: This clinician has an open Facility Onboarding case. Please review existing onboarding case.
* +_If SCP or both_+_: there can only be one open SCP onboarding case at a time_
* +_For all_+_: indicate priority for SCP onboarding and each selected HPF (default to Medium)_

_And upon clicking Finish, the system should direct the user back to the Clinician record_

!Clinician-LDD - V2-Contract-Request-Flow.jpeg|width=5834,height=5625,alt="Clinician-LDD - V2-Contract-Request-Flow.jpeg"! 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Clinician record and the Agreements tab
And I click on a Contract record in the Contract related list
Then from the Clinician Contract record, I can view the fields that hold Facility Rate information that the Clinician rate was created from:

* On the Contract Payment Agreement record(s)
** Click on the Related tab
** Click on the Contract Payment Agreement record
** Then “Facility Rate” is displayed on the Details tab
* On the Preventive Care Agreement(s)
** From the Contract Payment Agreement record, click on the Related tab
** Click on the Preventive Care Agreement record
** Then on the Details tab, I can see the following new fields:
*** Facility Rate
*** Previous Rate
*** Facility Level Rate

* Preventive Care Agreement

* Contract Payment Agreement
** Populated with original Contract Payment Agreement record

And on the “Preventive Care Agreement” the following fields are added to support the cloning process: (see DD for details)

* Previous Rate
* Facility Level Rate

** Ensure fields are made visible on permission sets that have object access. Permission Sets:
*** System Administrator
Manage Client Rates (R,C,E,D)
View Client Rates (R)
Manage Client Contracts (R,C)
View Client Contracts (R)
Data Integration (R,V)
* See Security for Object Permission
** OWD
** Permission Sets
** Permission Set Groups - new Payroll
** User Setup
* Add Related List to *Preventive Care Agreement*
** Name
** Pay Code 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Payroll team member in the Corporate Support apps

When I navigate to a Rate Pay Code record
Then I am able to see the following:

* Header - record name only
* Single region
** Tabs component: Details
*** Details tab contains fields as specified in data dictionary

14/Aug/25 10:24 AM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Contracting Accepted   Low ReadyForSprint, TADesignComplete Tammy Davis   PR1050558-892, PR1050558-1074 gagandeep.singh2 Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1138
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1467, PR1050558-1468, PR1050558-1608 A contract is Locum or Leased if the HPF field Employment_Type__c is.

ContractRequest OS structure is following:

!Captura de pantalla 2025-07-26 a la(s) 1.53.52 p.m..png|width=1108,height=540,alt="Captura de pantalla 2025-07-26 a la(s) 1.53.52 p.m..png"!

We modify Clinician_UpdateClinicianHPF to add a new Data Mapper that creates a contract if the Employment_Type__c of the HPF is Locum or Leased. Create as well the Provider Network Contract linking correctly the HPF with the Contract in the newly created PNC.
New introduced components to create Contract,PNCs should be reused in the story 1070 as well.



Security Matrix - tab = Permission Set Group

* For Permission Set Group = *Data Quality*
** Add Permission Set = Manage Clinician Contracts



Ignore below from solution:

----

[~accountid:61c036c29ee70a0068954daf] [~accountid:60c70906758a5d006aa9dba6] is it possible to have a virtual work in which then the clinician can select 2 HPF at the same time? or is it correct the Assumption that it will only work at an HPF so there will always be only one contract?
[~accountid:712020:573165ef-9cdd-4b0b-9f47-db81d880c096] There will be only 1 contract even if multiple HPFs are selected in the process. 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record
And I am able to select the Contract Request button in the highlights panel
And the following happens:

* Facility Selection screen built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893|smart-link]
* Skip Contract Confirmation built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-892|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-892|smart-link]

And User clicks “Finish”
Then the system shall

* Update the selected Healthcare Practitioner Facility records with the “Effective From” date that the user confirmed or updated.
* A Contract record (Record Type = Clinician) is created as defined in the solution
* A Provider Network Contract record is created as defined in the solution
* User shall be navigated back to new Clinician Contract record’s Summary tab. 		14/Aug/25 10:24 AM   4 Captura de pantalla 2025-07-26 a la(s) 1.53.52 p.m..png 21/Jul/25 6:00 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 23/Jul/25 12:33 PM 1|i099yk:8uy 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Data Quality team member, I need to create a “Contract” for leased and locums clinicians, so that we can move clinicians from initial data entry to onboarding 01/Aug/25

13/Aug/25 1:21 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Recruiting Accepted   Low ReadyForSprint, TADesignComplete Jasmine Moradi   PR1050558-827, PR1050558-852 harshgupta Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1112
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1471, PR1050558-1472, PR1050558-1609 Update the Record Page and Page Layout 0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support or Corporate Support Console app
When I navigate to a *Clinician Intake Form* record
Then I am able see:

* Header
** Subject is displayed - no additional fields in highlights panel below
* Main Region
** Tabs component: Details (Default), Responses, Files
*** Details tab: fields are displayed according to data dictionary
**** *Add fields to Additional Details section:*
***** Date/Time Opened
***** Date/Time Closed
**** *Add field to the System Information section:*
***** Case Number
*** Responses tab: assessment related list (will hold responses from the Intake Form guided experience)
*** Files tab: standard files related list

NOTE: This story makes updates to original page configuration made in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-827|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-827|smart-link]


Given that I am a Medical Staff Liaison or Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support App
When I navigate to a *Risk Review case* record
Then I am able to see:

* Header
** Subject is displayed in the top line
** Priority, Status, and Case Number are displayed as well

* Main Region
** Tabs component: Details (Default), Responses, Related, Files
*** Details tab: fields are displayed according to data dictionary
**** *Add fields to Additional Details section*:
***** Date/Time Opened
***** Date/Time Closed
**** *Add field to the System Information section*:
***** Case Number
*** Responses tab: assessment related list (see Risk Review case for reference)
*** Related tab: Approval Trace component (displays Approval History)
*** Files tab: standard files related list
* Right Region
** Approval Work Item

NOTE: This story makes updates to original page configuration made in[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-421|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-421|smart-link] & [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-903|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-903|smart-link] 		13/Aug/25 1:21 PM   4 image-20250806-082953.png 21/Jul/25 12:22 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 28/Jul/25 1:28 PM 1|i099yk:7i 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Corporate Support user, for cases Clinician Intake Form and Risk Review cases that I have visibility to I need to see additional information, so that I can see when a case was open, closed and the case number. 06/Aug/25

26/Aug/25 12:39 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Contracting Accepted   Low AgreementApprovalProcess, ReadyForSprint, TADesignComplete Ryan Woods   PR1050558-1715, PR1050558-1808, PR1050558-1812, PR1050558-1807, PR1050558-2078, PR1050558-2822, PR1050558-4073, PR1050558-894, PR1050558-1109, PR1050558-1389, PR1050558-2089, PR1050558-2210 nawal.bedmutha Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1110
No permission
 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1473, PR1050558-1474, PR1050558-1600 Follow solution as described in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-194|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-194|smart-link]

The cloning process should work like below

# Using the Parent Contract (ParentContractId) in Contract
# Use the AccountId and PractitionerId and Facility_Title__c from current selection to get the same AccountId and PractitionerId and Facility_Title__c from Previous Contract (identified by ParentContractId)
## When a HPF was found in the Previous Contract Copy All *Contract Payment Agreement* with Rate Type = *Leadership Incentives* and all related child *Preventive Care Agreement* *_all fields copied exactly as is_*
### *Contract Payment Agreement*.Cloned From = (Parent Clinician Contract) *Contract Payment Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Cloned From = (Parent Clinician Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate = (Parent Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate
## When a HPF was not found in earlier contract or a new Contract then copy the rates from the Client Contract *_all fields copied exactly as is_*
### *Contract Payment Agreement*.Facility Rate = (_Client Contract_) *Contract Payment Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Facility Rate = (_Client Contract_) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate = (Client Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate

Reuse all the components listed there, make sure all components are parameterized to query the required data. 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* record
And clicked on the *Contract Request* button
And I completed the process for a net new contract (current contract rates NOT copied over) or Start From Previous Active Contract (as defined in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link] )
And I am on *Clinician Contract’s Summary tab* ([https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-894|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-894|smart-link])
And I can see all the Healthcare Practitioner Facilities (HPF) associated with the Contract
Then for each HPF I have the ability to click on the *Configure Rates* button
And when I select the Configure Rates button:

* Rate Selection
** Single-select list for types of rates to configure:
*** Stipend, Shift, Variable, Target, Bonus, *Leadership Incentives*
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated
*** Next
* Rate Details
** When *Leadership Incentives* was selected, I can see the rates for the selected Type of Rate:
*** If rates exist, then the user will see the existing rates displayed
*** If rates do NOT exist, the user will see pre-determined Facility Rates from the Account for the selected Healthcare Practitioner Facility record
**** System automatically filters rates based on the Facility Title in the HPF record
**** Based on Contract Start Date, filter Facility Contract Payment Agreement rates that are applicable on that Start Date.
** User is able to de-select rates that do not apply to this clinician
** Account Name, Type, Rate, and Unit of Measure
** I am able to update the Rate (only when Override Prohibited is unchecked) or leave it with the existing value
*** User is not able to change the Rate to 0 or a negative number
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated
*** Previous
**** Returns to Rate Selection screen with the updates that the user made previously
*** Finish
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab

When I finish the guided experience

Then the system shall create the appropriate Contract Payment Agreement & Preventive Care Agreement records as specified in the solution. 		26/Aug/25 12:39 PM   5 21/Jul/25 11:43 AM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 22/Jul/25 1:23 PM 1|i099yr:zz6zx 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Recruiter, I need to request approval for clinician compensation, so that I can offer appropriate pay and incentives for clinicians to join SCP 04/Aug/25

Clinician Contract Request: Leadership Incentives

None
07/Aug/25

# Using the Parent Contract (ParentContractId) in Contract

## When a HPF was found in the Previous Contract Copy All *Contract Payment Agreement* with Rate Type = Stipend and all related child *Preventive Care Agreement* *_all fields copied exactly as is_*
### *Contract Payment Agreement*.Cloned From = (Parent Clinician Contract) *Contract Payment Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Cloned From = (Parent Clinician Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate = (Parent Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate
## When a HPF was not found in earlier contract or a new Contract then copy the rates from the Client Contract *_all fields copied exactly as is_*
### *Contract Payment Agreement*.Facility Rate = (_Client Contract_) *Contract Payment Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Facility Rate = (_Client Contract_) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate = (Client Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate

**** Based on Contract Start Date, filter Facility Contract Payment Agreement rates that are applicable on that Start Date.

**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab

The cloning process should work like below

# Using the Parent Contract (ParentContractId) in Contract
# Use the AccountId and PractitionerId and Facility_Title__c from current selection to get the same AccountId and PractitionerId and Facility_Title__c from Previous Contract (identified by ParentContractId)
## When a HPF was found in the Previous Contract Copy All *Contract Payment Agreement* with Rate Type = Target and all related child *Preventive Care Agreement* *_all fields copied exactly as is_*
### *Contract Payment Agreement*.Cloned From = (Parent Clinician Contract) *Contract Payment Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Cloned From = (Parent Clinician Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate = (Parent Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate
## When a HPF was not found in earlier contract or a new Contract then copy the rates from the Client Contract *_all fields copied exactly as is_*
### *Contract Payment Agreement*.Facility Rate = (_Client Contract_) *Contract Payment Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Facility Rate = (_Client Contract_) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate = (Client Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate

Reuse all the components listed there, make sure all components are parameterized to query the required data. 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* record
And clicked on the *Contract Request* button
And I completed the process for a net new contract (current contract rates NOT copied over) or Start From Previous Active Contract (as defined in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link] )
And I am on *Clinician Contract’s Summary tab* ([https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-894|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-894|smart-link])
And I can see all the Healthcare Practitioner Facilities (HPF) associated with the Contract
Then for each HPF I have the ability to click on the *Configure Rates* button
And when I select the Configure Rates button:

* Rate Selection
** Single-select list for types of rates to configure:
*** Stipend, Shift, Variable, *Target*, Bonus, Leadership Incentives
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated (nice to have)
*** Next
* Rate Details
** When *Target* was selected, I can see the rates for the selected Type of Rate:
*** If rates exist, then the user will see the existing rates displayed
*** If rates do NOT exist, the user will see pre-determined Facility Rates from the Account for the selected Healthcare Practitioner Facility record
**** System automatically filters rates based on the Facility Title in the HPF record
**** Based on Contract Start Date, filter Facility Contract Payment Agreement rates that are applicable on that Start Date.
*** User is able to de-select rates that do not apply to this clinician
** Account Name, Type, Rate, and Unit of Measure
** I am able to update the Rate (only when Override Prohibited is unchecked) or leave it with the existing value
*** User is not able to change the Rate to 0 or a negative number
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated (nice to have)
*** Previous
**** Returns to Rate Selection screen with the updates that the user made previously
*** Finish
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab (nice to have)

When I finish the guided experience

Then the system shall create the appropriate Contract Payment Agreement & Preventive Care Agreement records as specified in the solution. 		26/Aug/25 12:40 PM   5 21/Jul/25 11:10 AM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 22/Jul/25 1:21 PM 1|i099yr:zz6i 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Recruiter, I need to request approval for clinician compensation, so that I can offer appropriate pay and incentives for clinicians to join SCP 01/Aug/25

Clinician Contract Request: Target Rates

None

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1099, PR1050558-1100, PR1050558-1136 0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project _Story focus: implementing the functionality on the Facility Selection screen when user selects_ “Continue with Draft Request” or _“Discard and Start New Request”. Story 893 created the UI for the 2 selection options._



Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* record
And I can click on the *Contract Request* button
And the Facility Selection screen is displayed:

* If I have already initiated a Contract Request (contract record where Status = Draft)
** Then I can select between “Continue with Draft Request” or “Discard and Start New Request”

And if the user selected “*Continue with Draft Request*”
Then the user can select from a list of Healthcare Practitioner Facility records for that clinician where Status = Prospect, Candidate, Waiting to be Scheduled, Active, WTBS Here-WRKG at Sister Site.
And previously selected Healthcare Practitioner Facility are selected by default

* Navigation buttons
** Cancel
*** Returns to Clinician record and no records were created or updated
** Next



Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* record
And I can click on the *Contract Request* button
And the Facility Selection screen is displayed:

* If I have already initiated a Contract Request (contract record where Status = Draft)
** Then I can select between “Continue with Draft Request” or “Discard and Start New Request”

And if the user selected “*Discard and Start New Request*”
Then the user can select from a list of Healthcare Practitioner Facility records for that clinician where Status = Prospect, Candidate, Waiting to be Scheduled, Active, WTBS Here-WRKG at Sister Site

* Navigation buttons
** Cancel
*** Returns to Clinician record and no records were created or updated

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1254, PR1050558-1496, PR1050558-1497 Given that we click on the Contract Request button on Clinician, Omniscrip Clinician/ContractRequest runs.

# Screen Shows Employment Type Radio Button using Picklist (Contract.Employment Type) Built Part of [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1332|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1332|smart-link]
# Based on selected Employment Type query Contract record the Account Id = Clinician Id and Record Type= Clinician and Employment Type = Selected Type from Step1” and Status = Draft and sort by Last Modified Desc and pick the first record
## If a Contract Record exists then display radio button (Continue with Draft, Discard and Start new)
### Continue with Draft is selected
#### Navigate to Contract Record Page With Summary Tab
### Discard and Start new is selected
#### Delete Draft Contract and all child records Provider Network Contract, Contract Payment Agreement, Preventive Care Agreement
#### Go to Step 2.b
## If a Draft Contract Record did't exists
### query Contract record the Account Id = Clinician Id and Record Type= Clinician and Employment Type = Selected Type from Step1” and Status = Executed
#### Clone the Contract record
##### Name: Clinician Name + Todays Date
##### Parent Contract (-ParentContractId- PreviousContractId) = Contract from where data is Cloned from
##### Status = Draft
#### Clone new Provider Network Contract records with all Active HPF Part of the Contract Record and Deleted? = False {color:#ff991f}(what is a Active HPF inside a Contract?){color}
#### Clone new Contract Payment Agreement records
##### Provider Network Contract = new Provider Network Contract created in Step (ii)
##### Cloned From = Original Contract Payment Agreement
#### Clone new Preventive Care Agreement records with the relation to new Provider Network Contract lookup
##### Cloned From = Preventive Care Agreement record that is cloned from
##### Facility Rate = Facility Rate, Facility Title=Facility Title, Shift=Shift, Type=Type, Rate=Rate, Unit of Measure=Unit of Measure, Time Type=Time Type, Override Prohibited= Override Prohibited *(all fields need to be copied)*
# Update DD - tab = Contract (Clinician)
## Field = Status, add value = Canceled [Status Category: Canceled], remove Expired (see dd)
## New picklist field = Cancel Reason (see dd for values) 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project _Story focus on process when there is a Contract Change._

Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* record
Then I can click on the *Contract Request* button
And the system determines options to display:

* If a Clinician does NOT have any contracts or does NOT have any contracts in *Status* = *Draft* or *Executed*
** Display “Start New Request”
* If the Clinician HAS a Contract in *Status* = *Draft*
** Display “Continue with Draft Request” & “Discard and Start New Request”
* If the Clinician does NOT have a Contract in *Status* = *Draft* & Clinician HAS a Clinician Contract in *Status = Executed*
** Display “Start From Previous Active Contract” & “Start New Request”
* Navigation buttons
** Cancel
*** Returns to Clinician record and no records were created or updated
** Next

And User must select 1 option to proceed

* If the user selects “*Discard and Start New Request*”
** Then proceed to the HPF Selection built in [+PR1050558-893+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893]
*** In addition to the filtering criteria in 893, the Healthcare Practitioner Facility records are also filtered based on the selected Employment Type.
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician record and no records were created or updated
*** Finish
**** Directs the user to the newly created Clinician Contract’s Summary Tab (_nice to have_)
**** Appropriate records are created per the solution
**** Delete appropriate records (built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-210|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-210|smart-link])
* If the user selects “*Continue with Draft Request*”
** Then direct the user to the Draft Clinician Contract’s Summary Tab (_nice to have_)
* If the user selects “*Start New Request*”
** Then proceed to the HPF Selection built in [+PR1050558-893+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893]
** In addition to the filtering criteria in 893, the Healthcare Practitioner Facility records are also filtered based on the selected Employment Type.
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician record and no records were created or updated
*** Finish
**** Directs the user to the newly created Clinician Contract’s Summary Tab (_nice to have_)
**** Appropriate records are created per the solution
* If the user selects “*Start From Previous Active Contract*”
** Clone Clinician Contract as specified in the solution (clone: contract, PNC and rate records. Do not clone HPF)
** Direct the user to the newly created Clinician Contract’s Summary Tab (_nice to have_)
** Appropriate records are created per the solution 		12/Aug/25 10:36 PM   6 Clinician-Contract - V2-Contract-Request-Flow.jpeg 17/Jul/25 6:41 PM SCP Sprint 6 22/Jul/25 3:33 PM 1|i0afrn:x3 29/Jan/26 9:09 PM As a Recruiter, I need to request approval for clinician compensation, so that I can offer appropriate pay and incentives for clinicians to join SCP 30/Jul/25

Clinician Contract Request: Contract Changes

None

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-995, PR1050558-996, PR1050558-1122 Follow solution approach used in Client Contract *SpecifyRates_SummaryContractScreen* flexcard which is built for Client Contract and render records as per below mock UI

If the selected facility does NOT have any rates, then please display the following message:

"No rates are currently available. To add rates for this facility, please click the 'Configure Rates' button." 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Clinician *Contract* record (user successfully completed Contract Request guided experience [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link] )
Then on the *Summary tab*:

* The user has the ability click the “Add HPF” button to add additional Healthcare Practitioner Facilities if contract *status = Draft* (covered under story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1389|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1389|smart-link] )
* User has the ability to see all Healthcare Practitioner Facility (HPF) records that have been linked to the contract
* Within each Healthcare Practitioner Facility:
** The user has the ability see configured clinician rates for that particular facility
* The Rates are:
** Group by:
*** Type of Rate (shift, stipend, variable, etc)
**** Displayed in collapsible sections (collapsed by default)
*** Type (Shift Full Name or Type)
*** Rate and Unit of Measure (display “$” before Rate)
* The user has the ability to click the “Configure Rates” button to add more rates if contract *status = Draft*
* The user has the ability to Delete:
** The user can delete at a facility level
*** The system shall prompt the user to confirm deletion
*** The system shall remove the HPF from this contract and delete the PNC and all related rate records
*** The system shall prevent the user from deleting all HPFs, a contract must have at least one HPF
** The user can delete at a Type of Rate (shift, stipend, variable, etc)
*** The system shall prompt the user to confirm deletion
*** The system shall delete all records for that Type of Rate
** The user can delete at a specific Rate level (Rate & Unit of Measure)
*** The system shall prompt the user to confirm deletion
*** The system shall delete that single rate record





Note: Configure Rates button are part of stories:

* Bonus [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-194|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-194|smart-link]
* Target [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1103|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1103|smart-link]
* Variable [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1108|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1108|smart-link]
* Stipend [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1108|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1108|smart-link]
* Leadership Incentives [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1110|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1110|smart-link]
* Shift [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-210|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-210|smart-link] (starting from the “Rate Selection” screen) 		12/Aug/25 10:36 PM   5 image-20250728-140903.png 14/Jul/25 11:41 PM SCP Sprint 6 14/Jul/25 11:41 PM 1|i0afrn:xh5 29/Jan/26 9:09 PM As a Recruiter, I need to request approval for clinician compensation, so that I can offer appropriate pay and incentives for clinicians to join SCP 30/Jul/25

Omniscript runs an Integration Procedure calling a data mapper to know if a ContractRequest record already exist, so the mentioned options “Continue with Draft Request” or “Discard and Start New Request” are shown in a Omniscript Step.

Create Data Mapper to extract Healthcare Practioner Facility records with the given Status and display to user for selection. 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* record
Then I can click on the *Contract Request* button
And the Facility Selection screen is displayed:

* If I have already initiated a Contract Request (contract record where Status = Draft)
** Then I can select between “Continue with Draft Request” or “Discard and Start New Request”
* If I have not initiated a Contract Request
** I can select from a list of Healthcare Practitioner Facility records for that clinician where *Status = Prospect, Candidate, Waiting to be Scheduled, Active, WTBS Here-WRKG at Sister Site* to determine which HPFs I want to draft the Contract Request for
*** Fields to display: Account, Facility Title, Status, Contracting Status
*** User must select at least 1 facility to proceed
** If the clinician does not have Healthcare Practitioner Facility records where *Status = Prospect, Candidate, Waiting to be Scheduled, Active, WTBS Here-WRKG at Sister Site*, display the following message “This clinician does not have a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record. Please complete the Create HPF workflow.”
*** Process ends; user can select Finish and the guided experience closes.
* Navigation buttons
** Cancel
*** Returns to Clinician record and no records were created or updated

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1252, PR1050558-1498, PR1050558-1499 * Use a flex card to display each ATS Applicant record.
* For each ATS Applicant record that should be a button *Withdraw Application*
* When the user clicks on the Individual button show the message as specific in AC
* Update the ATS record with the details specific in AC
* Security Matrix updates:
** Tab = Permission Set
*** Permission Set = Portal User
**** Add Edit access to the following object:
***** *ATS Applicant*
**** Add Read & Edit access to the following object:
***** *Healthcare Practitioner Facility* 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Clinician in the Prospect Portal
If I have an ATS Applicant record where Status = Active
Then I am able to see the following:

* My Applications
** List of ATS Applicant records where Applicant = my person account record
** And when I click the Job field, then I can see the following:
*** *Withdraw Application button*

Given I am a Clinician in the Prospect Portal

If I have an ATS Applicant record where Status = Active
And I click the Withdraw Application button
Then the following happens

* Confirmation Screen
** User can see the following message “Are you sure you want to withdraw your application to [Job Name]? This action cannot be undone.”
** User is required to select *Withdrawal Reason* (single select picklist)
*** If Other is selected, user must populate Other Reason
** Navigation Options
*** Cancel - close out the window, no updates made
*** Next with checking the checkbox - the following updates are made:
* Automated Updates
** ATS Applicant record
*** Status = *Rejected*
*** Declined Reason = *Candidate Declined*
*** Declined Detail = [what user selected]
*** Other Reason = [what user populated]
** Healthcare Practitioner Facility record (where Practitioner Facility Name = Account Name from Job record AND Practitioner = Applicant from ATS Applicant record)
*** Status = *Inactive*

NOTE: if in the event the update fails then a message will display with a finish button: There was an error while processing the request, please contact the system administrator.



----

Withdrawal Reason

* Accepted Another Position
* Benefits Package Not Competitive
* Clinical Scope Not Aligned with My Skills or Interests
* Compensation Package Not Competitive
* Concerns about Practice Culture, Stability, or Reputation
* Contract Terms (Non-Financial) Not Acceptable
* Credentialing Process Too Burdensome
* Decided to Stay at Current Position
* Licensing or Visa Complications
* Location Not Desirable
* Negative Interview Experience
* No Longer Seeking a New Opportunity
* Organization’s Values Not Aligned with Mine
* Personal Circumstances Have Changed
* Poor Communication During Recruitment
* Practice Model Not a Good Fit
* Prefer Not to Disclose
* Process Taking Too Long
* Scheduling Expectations Not Acceptable
* Other 		26/Aug/25 12:34 PM   4 Screenshot 2025-08-04 at 2.41.01 PM.png 14/Jul/25 10:30 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 04/Aug/25 5:41 AM dark_blue 1|i099yr:v 29/Jan/26 9:09 PM As a Prospective Clinician, I need to view information about my open applications in HC portal, so that I can understand the latest status and see important information about the job 05/Aug/25

Create a Flex Card to Display the ATS Applicant Record(s)

* Parent Record ID = person account for the logged in user
** Job Name = bpats__Job__c.Name
** Application Date = bpats__Initial_Application_Date__c
** Recruiter = bpats__Job__r.Recruiter__c.Name
** Stage = bpats__Stage__c
** Facility Name = bpats__Job__r.Facility_Name__c.Name
** Recruiter Phone = bpats__Job__r.Recruiter__c.Phone
** Recruiter Email = bpats__Job__r.Recruiter__c.Phone 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Clinician in the Prospect Portal
If I have an ATS Applicant record where Status = Active
Then I am able to see the following:

* My Applications [new tab]
** List of ATS Applicant records where Applicant = my person account record
** Fields to display: *Job, Initial Application Date, Recruiter*

When I navigate to the Code Set tab
Then I am able to see the following list views:

* All Code Sets
** Columns to display: Name, Code Set Type, Code, Active (use Active__c formula field), Last Modified Date
** Filters: none
* Facility Titles
** Columns to display: Name, Effective Date, End Date, Active (use Active__c formula field), Last Modified Date, Code Set Sub Type, Can Have Leadership Incentive?
** Filters: Code Set Type = Facility Title
* Risk Review Questions
** Columns to display: Name, Effective Date, End Date, Active (use Active__c formula field), Last Modified Date
** Filters: Code Set Type = Provider Risk Review
* Rate Configurations
** Columns to display: Name, Code Set Type, Effective Date, End Date, Active (use Active__c formula field), Last Modified Date
** Filters: Code Set Type = Shift, Bonus, Stipend, Variable or Leadership Incentives

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-921, PR1050558-922, PR1050558-1246, PR1050558-1430 Create a record triggered flow

Check if there is a HPF already associated ATS Applicant (bpats_ATS_Applicant_c.Id = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Job_Applicant__c)

If Exists do Nothing

If Not then Create a HPF record based on mapping in AC 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I update the *ATS Stage* field on an *ATS Applicant* record to *Offer*
Then a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record is automatically created with the following attributes:

||*Healthcare Practitioner Facility field*||*value to populate*||
|Practitioner Facility Name|ATS Applicant > Job > Account Name (formula)|
|Practitioner|ATS Applicant > Applicant (lookup - contact)|
|Account|ATS Applicant > Job > Account (lookup - account)|
|Facility Title|ATS Applicant > Job > Facility Title (lookup)|
|Status|Prospect|
|Time Type|ATS Applicant > Job > Planned Status
_On Call and Locums are not on Job but on HPF_|
|Job Applicant|ATS Applicant (Id)|

ATS Applicant object = bpats_ATS_Applicant_c

Job object = bpats_Job_c

_This automation copies information from the Job on the ATS Applicant record. Any changes must be completed prior to changing the ATS Stage to Offer Term Sheet._ 		26/Aug/25 12:37 PM   9 08/Jul/25 6:00 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 15/Jul/25 4:56 PM 1|i099yr:zy 16/Feb/26 3:40 PM As a Recruiter, I need Healthcare Practitioner Facility records to be automatically created when I associate an applicant to a job, so that I can avoid duplicate work when a clinician is tied to a specific location

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1008, PR1050558-1009, PR1050558-1127 Implement using OmniScript as is more powerful than Screen flow and the user story is complex.

In following step change the message as required.

!Captura de pantalla 2025-07-18 a la(s) 5.43.40 a.m..png|width=761,height=654,alt="Captura de pantalla 2025-07-18 a la(s) 5.43.40 a.m..png"!

Create DataMapper that queries for all the contracts belonging to a HPFs. This Data Mapper should be called in Clinician_GetManualOnboardingDetailsIP so that we have the results. Given our Data Model and put the corresponding message in the previous step. So that we can put the corresponding message.

In case Facility Specific or Both, create a Data Mapper to check if existing onbording cases exist. This is currently done in GETHPFAndOnboardingCaseDM DataMapper.

!Captura de pantalla 2025-07-18 a la(s) 6.03.08 a.m..png|width=979,height=561,alt="Captura de pantalla 2025-07-18 a la(s) 6.03.08 a.m..png"! 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Medical Staff Liaison, Enrollment Specialist, Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support App
When I navigate to a *clinician* person account record
Then I can click on the *Initiate Early Onboarding* button
Then I am presented with the following:

* +Check if a Contract has been requested+: if this clinician does not have a Contract record where Status = New, Draft, Submitted, or Approved, then I am presented with the following message: “This clinician does not have a requested contract. We cannot initiate early onboarding. Please discuss with the recruiter for this clinician’s facility.”



_And I am able to populate the following:_

* _What onboarding type needs to start early?_
** _Facility specific, SCP, or both_
* +_If facility specific or both_+_: select from a list of Healthcare Practitioner Facility records (display Status field) without existing onboarding cases_
** If no Healthcare Practitioner Facility record meet the criteria then display the following message: *This clinician has an open Facility Onboarding case. Please review existing onboarding case.*
* +_If SCP or both_+_: there can only be one open SCP onboarding case at a time_
* +_For all_+_: indicate priority for SCP onboarding and each selected HPF (default to Medium)_

_And upon clicking Finish, the system should direct the user back to the Clinician record_

NOTE: SCP Onboarding message is part of story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-835|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-835|smart-link] 		30/Jul/25 1:03 PM   7 Captura de pantalla 2025-07-18 a la(s) 5.43.40 a.m..png 08/Jul/25 5:37 PM SCP Sprint 5, SCP Sprint 6 15/Jul/25 8:33 AM 1|i099yo: 29/Jan/26 9:09 PM As a Medical Staff Liaison, Enrollment Specialist, Data Quality team member, I need to create Onboarding cases, so that I can begin clinician privileging before contract execution if needed 23/Jul/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1230, PR1050558-1258, PR1050558-1502, PR1050558-1503 Add Final step to Risk Review Approvals Flow

When the Everyone has Approved in the End of the Flow create the Notification to Payroll Step.

Use custom metadata to store the email Ids to send emails to for avoiding hardcoding

Use the Final Decision template created in: [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-903|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-903|smart-link] with different body of the email. In the subject line below, I crossed out rejected because we only send this notification if it’s approved.

* Email Subject: <insert Case Type> Case <insert case number> is <approved -or rejected->

Mario’s Notes:

The last 2 steps in Flow Risk Review Approvals called and autolaunched Flow called Risk Review Action Handler Flow with actionName variable set to Update_Case.

!Captura de pantalla 2025-07-27 a la(s) 6.06.19 p.m..png|width=1243,height=955,alt="Captura de pantalla 2025-07-27 a la(s) 6.06.19 p.m..png"!

This flow has another action that reads answers from the Assesment (under actionName fetch_Details, please see following image). Follow this idea in order to send the notification under the specified conditions.

!Captura de pantalla 2025-07-27 a la(s) 6.12.05 p.m..png|width=857,height=574,alt="Captura de pantalla 2025-07-27 a la(s) 6.12.05 p.m..png"! 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a SVP Litigation, Regional Medical Officer, or Compliance user

And the following happens:

* Automated updates
** Email notification with final decision built in [+PR1050558-903+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-903]
** *Risk Review with “Garnishments/Liens/Child support issues (route to Legal & Payroll)”*
*** If
**** “Garnishments/Liens/Child support issues (route to Legal & Payroll)” was checked in the Risk Review
**** And the risk review was approved
*** Send a notification to payroll
**** Send an email to [*EEPR@scphealth.com*|mailto:EEPR@scphealth.com] *and* [*PHYSPR@scphealth.com*|mailto:PHYSPR@scphealth.com] *(NOTE: These are Production emails)*
**** Email content
***** *Hello,*
*****A risk review has recently been approved for clinician [full name]. This review included Garnishments/Liens/Child support issues.* 		08/Aug/25 2:23 PM   6 Captura de pantalla 2025-07-27 a la(s) 6.06.19 p.m..png 08/Jul/25 3:03 PM SCP Sprint 6 22/Jul/25 4:24 PM 1|i0afrn:xi 29/Jan/26 9:09 PM As a Payroll team member, I need to receive a notification when Risk Review assessment is approved, so that I am aware of reviews that included Garnishments/Liens/Child support issues. 30/Jul/25

** Preventive Care Agreement
*** Field = Cloned From
**** Permission Sets with visibility to object = Preventive Care Agreement:
System Administrator
Manage Client Rates
View Client Rates
Manage Client Contracts
View Client Contracts
Manage Clinician Rates
Manage Clinician Contracts
Data Integration
** Contract Payment Agreement
**# Field = Cloned From
**## Permission Sets with visibility to object = Contract Payment Agreement
**##* System Administrator
**##* Manage Client Rates
**##* View Client Rates
**##* Manage Client Contracts
**##* View Client Contracts
**##* Manage Clinician Rates
**##* Manage Clinician Contracts
**##* Data Integration
** Contract (RT: Clinician)
**# Field = “Previous Contract”
**## Permission Sets with visibility to object = Contract (Clinician)
**##* System Administrator
**##* Manage Client Contracts
**##* View Client Contracts
**##* Manage Clinician Contracts
**##* Data Integration

The assumption is that this story is filling data in the new Cloned From field in Preventive Care Agreement. This needs to be done in OS ContractRequest. If there is an existing Contract, we clone the rates, if this happens this fields needs to be filled when the rates are cloned. -This is still an ongoing discussion so the diagrams will be provided once the discussion is closed.-

Contract cloning functionality is being built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link] - refer Contract Request flow diagram attached there.
 0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Clinician record and the Agreements tab
And I click on a Contract record in the Contract related list
Then from the Clinician Contract record, I can view the Cloned From field:

* On the Contract Payment Agreement record(s)
** Click on the Related tab
** Click on the Contract Payment Agreement record
** Then “Cloned From” is displayed on the Details tab
* On the Preventive Care Agreement(s)
** From the Contract Payment Agreement record, click on the Related tab
** Click on the Preventive Care Agreement record
** Then “Cloned From is displayed on the Details tab

And on the Clinician Contract record I can see new field = “Previous Contract” on the Details tab



Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps

When I navigate to a Clinician Contract record and configure a cloned rate - built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link]
Then the ‘Cloned From’ lookup is populated on:

* Preventive Care Agreement
** Populated with the original Preventive Care Agreement record
* Contract Payment Agreement
** Populated with the original Contract Payment Agreement record

And the “*Previous Contract*” lookup is populated:

* Contract (RT: Clinician)
** Populated with the original *Clinician* Contract record. Do NOT populated with a Client Contract. 		12/Aug/25 10:37 PM   8 image-20250811-155336.png 12/Jun/25 5:36 PM SCP Sprint 6 23/Jul/25 2:27 PM 1|i0cqdb: 29/Jan/26 9:10 PM As a Recruiter, I want a comprehensive view of a Clinician’s Contract, so that I can see where they are in then process and what information is needed. 06/Aug/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-993, PR1050558-994, PR1050558-1121 In OmniScript built in user story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893|smart-link] , add a step after facility selection.

This step should contain customOmniSelect LWC with types of rates as values, so create an Integration Procedure and Data Mapper to retieve and pass the values to the LWC. See following Data Mapper example to retrieve Type of Rates (make sure values are not hardcoded:

!Captura de pantalla 2025-07-18 a la(s) 12.02.48 a.m..png|width=1469,height=702,alt="Captura de pantalla 2025-07-18 a la(s) 12.02.48 a.m..png"!

Create an IP that receives selected values. If Shift is among the selected values then retrieve the applicable rates using a Data Mapper.

Refer Component Design and Contract Structure images for more details.

* Updated the Security Matrix, added delete to “*Manage Clinician Rates” & “Manage Clinician Contracts” permission set.* [~accountid:712020:a573db14-8ea0-48cc-9d4a-b9c27f70cf80] [~accountid:60c70906758a5d006aa9dba6] [~accountid:712020:573165ef-9cdd-4b0b-9f47-db81d880c096] [~accountid:61f8618e8d9e3c00688e380b] 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Story focus on net new scenario.

Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* record
Then I can click on the *Contract Request* button
And the following happens:

* Facility Selection screen built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893|smart-link]
* Rate Selection
** Single-select list for types of rates to configure:
*** Stipend, *Shift*, Variable, Target, Bonus
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician record and no records were created or updated
*** Previous
**** Returns to Facility Selection screen with the updates that the user made previously
*** Next
* Rate Details
** When Shift was selected, I can see the pre-determined Facility Rates from the Account on each selected Healthcare Practitioner Facility record
*** System automatically filters rates based on the Facility Title in the HPF record [DO NOT TEST, changing in Sprint 6]
**** Based on Contract Start Date, filter Facility Contract Payment Agreement rates that are applicable on that Start Date.
*** User is able to de-select rates that do not apply to this clinician [DO NOT TEST, changing in Sprint 6]
*** Each facility’s rates display in an accordion/collapsible view [DO NOT TEST, changing in Sprint 6]
** Account Name, Shift Full Name, Rate, and Unit of Measure [DO NOT TEST, changing in Sprint 6]
** I am able to update the Rate (only when Override Prohibited is unchecked) or leave it with the existing value
*** User is not able to change the Rate to 0 or a negative number
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician record and no records were created or updated
*** Previous
**** Returns to Rate Selection screen with the updates that the user made previously
*** Finish
* Summary tab built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-894|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-894|smart-link]

When I finish the guided experience

Then the system shall create the appropriate records based on:

* If new contract [Only test creation of Contract, Provider Network Contract. Changes Sprint 6 - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link] on when Contract Payment Agreement, Preventive Care Agreement records get created]
** Create new Contract, Provider Network Contract, Contract Payment Agreement, Preventive Care Agreement records
* If user selected “Continue with Draft Request” [DO NOT TEST, changes Sprint 6 - [+PR1050558-1070+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070]]
** Do NOT create new Contract, use previous created Contract (Status = Draft)
** Create or update Contract Payment Agreement, Preventive Care Agreement records.
* If user selected “Discard and Start New Request” [DO NOT TEST, changes Sprint 6 - [+PR1050558-1070+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070]]
** Delete previous Contract, Provider Network Contract, Contract Payment Agreement, Preventive Care Agreement records
** Create new Contract, Provider Network Contract, Contract Payment Agreement, Preventive Care Agreement records 		12/Aug/25 10:37 PM   8 Captura de pantalla 2025-07-18 a la(s) 12.02.48 a.m..png 30/May/25 3:47 PM SCP Sprint 5, SCP Sprint 6 04/Jun/25 5:24 PM 1|i08c0x:u3k 29/Jan/26 9:10 PM As a Recruiter, I need to request approval for clinician compensation, so that I can offer appropriate pay and incentives for clinicians to join SCP 10/Jun/25
